AppSummary: Clean, synchronized floating lyrics for Spotify on Wayland.
BackgroundOpacityDescription: Only affects the floating panel background
BottomMarginDescription: Distance from the bottom edge of the screen
BottomPanelHeightDescription: Keeps the lyrics clear of a bottom desktop panel
CandidateUnavailable: This candidate has no usable lyrics
DisplayDescription: Control the size, position, and background of the floating panel.
FontsDescription: Choose fonts and arrange their fallback priority
LyricFontSizeDescription: Pixel size for the current lyric line
TranslationFontSizeDescription: Pixel size for the translation text
RomanizationFontSizeDescription: Pixel size for the romanization text
PlayedColorDescription: Color for karaoke syllables that have already been played
UnplayedColorDescription: Color for karaoke syllables not yet reached
TranslationColorDescription: Color for the translation text line
RomanizationColorDescription: Color for the romanization text line
GeneralDescription: Choose a language and adjust lyrics timing and secondary text.
GlobalOffsetDescription: Milliseconds; positive values show lyrics earlier
InspiredByLyricsX: FloatLyrics is inspired by LyricsX and its thoughtful desktop-lyrics experience.
LicenseStatement: Licensed under the GNU General Public License v3.0 or later.
LyricsCacheWriteError: Could not save lyrics to the cache
NoLyricsFound: No lyrics found from the configured sources
OpenSourceDescription: FloatLyrics is built with these great open source projects.
PanelWidthDescription: Pixels; long lyrics can expand the panel
PreviewLoadFailed: Could not load the lyrics preview
PreviewReady: Preview loaded; the selected lyrics can be applied
SearchAfterPlayback: Play a song to search and bind lyrics manually
SearchPriorityDescription: Try the second source when the first has no result
SearchingProviders: Searching QQ Music and NetEase Cloud Music…
SelectCandidatePreview: Select a candidate to preview its lyrics
ShowRomanizationDescription: Generated locally from the original lyrics
ShowTranslationDescription: When supplied by the lyrics source
SourcesDescription: Search online sources in order; changes reload the current track.
Title: Title
